case_title: JORDANA CAHEN VS. ROBERTO ANTONIO GAMERO JR

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-20-2022 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO OCT-19-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JORDANA CAHEN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ROBERTO ANTONIO GAMERO JR. IS PRESENT VIA CONFERENCE CALL. DEFENDANT WAS UNABLE TO APPEAR/JOIN BY ZOOM DUE TO TECHNICAL ISSUES. COURT ALLOWS DEFENDANTS' APPEARANCE OVER THE TELEPHONE. DEFENDANT MAKES REQUEST FOR A CONTINUANCE TO ALLOW FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO BE PRESENTED AT THE NEXT HEARING. COURT GRANTS ZOOM APPEARANCE AT THE NEXT HEARING DATE. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. NO EXHIBITS. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK:RETURN MAIL BY POST OFFICE APR-06-2023 CONTINUE ORDER MAIL TO DEFENDANT(ENVOLOPE MARKED:RETURN TO SENDER NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED UNABLE TO FORWARD) RECEIVED AFTER COURT DISMISSAL.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-19-2022 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION DUE TO THE CONDITION OF THE COURT CALENDAR TO NOV-23-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. CONTINUED FOR CASE TO BE HEARD BY JUDGE MICHELLE TONG. CONTINUED DATE HAS BEEN INFORMED TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-30-2023 - CONTINUED FOR **FINAL PROGRESS REPORT** TO MAR-27-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. ON NOV-23-2022, PARTIES REACH A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT FOR $555.00 TO BE PAID IN 3 INSTALLMENT PAYMENTS OF $185.00. 1ST PAYMENT TO BE DUE ON JANUARY 22, 2023. ADDITIONAL PAYMENTS ARE DUE ON THE 22ND OF EACH MONTH. FINAL PAYMENT DUE ON MARCH 22, 2023. PAYMENTS TO BE MADE BY VENMO @ANGEL_REY. **FINAL PROGRESS REPORT** IS SET FOR MARCH 27, 2023. NO APPEARANCE REQUIRED IF PAYMENT IS MADE AS AGREED. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED IF PAYMENT IS NOT MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE FINAL PROGRESS REPORT DATE, THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. JUDGE: MURLENE J. RANDLE; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
REMARK:RETURN MAIL BY POST OFFICE FEB-22-23 CONTINUE ORDER MAIL TO DEFENDANT (ENVOLOPE MARKED:RETURN TO SENDER NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED UNABLE TO FORWARD)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $40) SERVED JUN-02-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GAMERO JR, ROBERTO ANTONIO
ORDER OF CONTINUANCE PURSUANT TO REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO ALLOW FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-23-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JAN-30-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. - PLAINTIFF JORDANA CAHEN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ROBERTO ANTONIO GAMERO JR IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. PARTIES REACH A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT FOR $555.00 TO BE PAID IN 3 INSTALLMENT PAYMENTS OF $185.00. 1ST PAYMENT TO BE DUE ON JANUARY 22, 2023. ADDITIONAL PAYMENTS ARE DUE ON THE 22ND OF EACH MONTH. FINAL PAYMENT DUE ON MARCH 22, 2023. PAYMENTS TO BE MADE BY VENMO @ANGEL_REY. PROGRESS REPORT IS SET FOR JANUARY 30, 2023. NO APPEARANCE REQUIRED IF PAYMENT IS MADE AS AGREED. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED IF PAYMENT IS NOT MADE. FINAL PROGRESS REPORT DATE IS TO BE SET AFTER MARCH 22, 2023. IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE FINAL PROGRESS REPORT DATE, THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,997.00 FILED BY CAHEN, JORDANA AS TO DEFENDANT GAMERO JR, ROBERTO ANTONIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-20-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: CONTINAUNCE FOR PROGRESS REPORT.
REMARK:RETURN MAIL DEC-05-2022,CONTINUE ORDER MAIL TO ROBERTO GAMERO JR, NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED UNABLE TO FORWARD
ORDER CONTINUED FOR *FINAL* PROGRESS REPORT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
